title: Etsan's Better Discs 1.21.7
description: Updated the textures of the music discs as the texture was very outdated and was in need of a fresh new look!
body: ![Gallery of all Discs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6b5177e0bd24ecd89996e853574326d5651ded.png)This pack only changes the music discs so they don't look outdated and.. well.. not good..
